techniques.name: RF false brainwave injection
techniques.description: Injection of spurious RF signals into the ADC inputs to mimic valid cortical activity.

techniques.name: Intermodulation (BCI signal weaponized)
techniques.description: Exploiting ADC non-linearities to create intermodulation distortion in the therapy loop.

techniques.name: Motor hijacking
techniques.description: Direct stimulation pattern injection overriding motor control circuits.

techniques.name: Temporal Evasion Injection
techniques.description: High-frequency bursting payloads designed to evade traditional windowed average anomaly detection.

techniques.name: Session Replay Masking
techniques.description: Captures a clean segment of EEG data and replays it over target channels to mask concurrent malicious activity.

meta.description: NeuroShield Minimal Fallback Registry. For the full 161-technique registry, link the external neurosecurity datalake.
